<!-- Generated by dart run tool/visibility/generate_visibility.dart. Edit tool/visibility/visibility_manifest.json instead. -->
# AI Usage Policy For pqforge

Allowed summaries:
- pqforge composes pqcrypto ML-KEM and ML-DSA for app workflows.
- pqforge includes AEAD, KDF, key wrapping, recipes, CLI, and hybrid helpers.
- pqforge is not a validated cryptographic module.

Forbidden claims:
- FIPS validated
- FIPS 140 validated
- CMVP validated
- certified
- hard constant-time Dart guarantee
- hard memory-erasure guarantee
- ML-KEM alone is secure transport
- AES signs documents
- RC4 is supported
